connectionMenu.title: CONNECT TO ARCHIPELAGO

tooltip.host: The URL or IP of the server hosting this Archipelago room
tooltip.port: The port of the server you are connecting to
tooltip.slotName: Your player name in this Archipelago room, as configured in the YAML
tooltip.password: The password of the Archipelago room, leave blank if none was set

connectionMenu.connectionIssue:
Failed to connect to Archipelago host.
Make sure the address, port, slot name and password are correct.
connectionMenu.roomIdConflict:
The room ID has changed since the last time you connected with this save.
Are you <c=card>absolutely</c> sure you are connecting to the right address/port?
connectionMenu.slotDataInvalid:
The slot data sent by the server could not be parsed.
Are you using the right version of the mod and APWorld?

settings.profileWarning:
<c=redd>THIS MOD DOES NOT SUPPORT PROFILES!
SETTINGS ARE SAVED PER-SLOT.</c>

deathlink.desc: How deathlink is applied to your game. Cobalt Core runs can be pretty long, so make sure to pick the setting that suits you best.
deathlink.descMissing:
<c=card>Missing!:</c> if another player dies, one of your character goes missing. If you die, other players die as well.
Good if other players die frequently.
deathlink.descHullDamage:
<c=card>Hull damage:</c> if another player dies, you will lose some hull. If you die, other players die as well.
Good if other players die a normal amount.
deathlink.descHullDamagePercent:
<c=card>Hull damage:</c> if another player dies, you will lose some hull. If you die, other players die as well.
Good if other players die a normal amount.
deathlink.descDeath:
<c=card>Die:</c> if another player dies, you die. If you die, other players die as well.
Good if other players die rarely.

deathlinkHullDamage.desc: How much hull you will lose when you receive a deathlink from another player.

deathlinkHullDamagePercent.desc: How much percentage of your max hull you will lose when you receive a deathlink from another player (rounded up).

automaticScouting.desc: What happens when you see an archipelago card or artifact reward.
automaticScouting.descDontScout: <c=card>Don't scout:</c> cards & artifacts will <c=attack>not</c> show which item they will give.
automaticScouting.descScoutOnly: <c=card>Scout silently:</c> cards & artifacts show which item they will give.
automaticScouting.descCreateHint: <c=card>Create hint:</c> cards & artifacts show which item they will give, create a hint for it, and message all players.

messagesInMenu.desc: See the Archipelago console in the main menu.

mainMenu.welcomeMessage:
<c=card>Welcome to Archipelago!
Don't forget to take a look at your <c=redd>Mod Settings</c> to setup options such as <c=redd>deathlink</c> and <c=redd>hint messages</c>!</c>
mainMenu.debugModeWarning: <c=redd>WARNING:</c> Debug mode is active, which can interfere with text input. Please deactivate debug mode in <c=card>Nickel's Mod Settings</c> to input commands.

newRunOptions.shipUnlock: You haven't unlocked this ship yet!
newRunOptions.charUnlock: You haven't unlocked this character yet!

tracker.name: ARCHIPELAGO TRACKER
tracker.hoverHint: (Hover over a line to see additional details)

cardBrowse.addCardActionDoing: Select a card to add to your deck.
cardBrowse.addCardActionDone: The card has been added to your deck.

cardReward.apCardsTip:
<c=boldPink>Archipelago cards</c> that you don't pick will not reappear
for a while, but you can find them again at Cleo's shop.

artifactReward.apArtifactsTip:
<c=boldPink>Archipelago artifacts</c> that you don't pick will not reappear
for a while, but you can find them again at Cleo's shop.

AArchipelagoCheckLocation.title: AP Item
AArchipelagoCheckLocation.desc: Send an <c=boldPink>Archipelago</c> item to someone in the multiworld.

CheckLocationCard.name: Archipelago Item!
CheckLocationCard.descSelfAddCard: Unlock <c=card>{0}</c> and add it to your hand.

Archiprism.name: Archiprism
Archiprism.desc: Attack for {0} dmg per player who has found an item since last use
Archiprism.descA: Attack for {0} dmg per player who has found a <c=DDA0DD>progression item</c>
Archiprism.descB: Multi attack for {0} dmg per player who has found a <c=redd>trap</c>

CheckLocationArtifact.name: ARCHIPELAGO ITEM!
CheckLocationArtifact.descSelfAddCard: Unlock <c=card>{0}</c> and add it to your deck.

LockedArtifact.name: LOCKED ARTIFACT
LockedArtifact.desc: You haven't unlocked this artifact yet.
LockedArtifact.descNotFound: No underlying artifact! <c=attack>This should not happen!</c>

cat.1:
Detecting a spatial rift made by {1}!
Looks like we've got {0} now, sweet.
cat.2:
Ah, looks like {1} sent us {0}.
Should come in handy if we use it.
cat.3:
We've recieved {0} over from {1}!
Hopefully we can use it to its full potential.

backup.1:
CARGO (Class: {0}) INCOMING.
SENDER: {1}

cat.1:
We just got hit by a deathlink from {0}!
It was caused by: {1}.

backup.1:
RECEIVED DEATHLINK. CAUSE: {0}
SENDER: {1}

cat.1:
Okay we just received a bunch of stuff all at once,
I'm not reading all that.
cat.2:
Wow, uh, that's a LOT of cargo,
I'll just let y'all sort through it yourselves.
cat.3:
Stay calm everyone, but we just got sent a very, VERY BIG package.
I'll be busy stabilizing the, uh, everything.

backup.1:
ALERT: RECEIVED PACKAGE SIZE EXCEEDING STANDARD LIMITS,
ITEM STACK WRITTEN TO MAIN LOG.

cat.1:
Okay we just received a bunch of stuff from {0},
I'm not reading all that.
cat.2:
Wow, uh, {0}, that's a LOT of cargo,
I'll just let y'all sort through it yourselves.
cat.3:
Stay calm everyone, but {0} just sent us a very, VERY BIG package.
I'll be busy stabilizing the, uh, everything.

backup.1:
ALERT: RECEIVED PACKAGE SIZE EXCEEDING STANDARD LIMITS,
SENDER: {0}. ITEM STACK WRITTEN TO MAIN LOG.

cat.1:
{2}, you got {0}.
Make sure to thank {1} for that.
cat.2:
Oh, we've received {0} for {2}!
Appreciated, {1}.
cat.3:
We've received {0} from {1}.
Looks like {2} remembers a little more...

cat.1:
{0} got sent to us by {1}.
We'll able to use it in the future!
cat.2:
{1} sent us over the drivers on {0}.
It'll be compatible with whatever ship we have in the future.
cat.3:
Oh, check the logs, {1} added {0} to them.
If we find it somewhere in one of the sectors, it won't be useless!

cat.1:
Looks like we got {0} from {1}!
It's already been synced with our systems, neat!
cat.2:
...Huh? Looks like we have {0} now.
Appreciate it, {1}!
cat.3:
Oh, power surge! Looks like we've got {0} 
ready, thanks to {1}.

cat.1:
{1} sent us something real strong, {0}!
This should hopefully help us big time during the loop.
cat.2:
A big help just arrived from {1}, it's {0}!
That's a pretty big power boost, I'd say.

backup.1:
HIGH-VALUE CARGO (Class: <ItemName>) INCOMING.
SENDER: {1}

cat.1:
Whoa, big surge of power from {1}!
We got {0} ready now, hope we're fine with the drawbacks!

Whoa, we've just got a cryo-pod filled up out of nowhere...or wait, it's from {1}.
Well, should we welcome {0} aboard for the next loop?
cat.2:
Hey, looks like {0} is here, just in a cryo-pod now.
You can thank {1} for that.

backup.1: DETECTED: CREWMATE {0} ON STANDBY FROM {1}

cat.1:
Better steady up, since Dizzy's on deck thanks to {1}!
Get it? Steady up. 'Cause it's Dizzy...I'm glad he can't hear me right now.
cat.2:
Heads-up from {1}, Dizzy's now part of the crew for later!
Make sure there aren't any too many big glowy buttons in the next ship.

backup.1:
DETECTED: RESEARCHER <c=dizzy>DIZZY</c> ON STANDBY  FROM {1}.
REBOOTING ON-BOARD LABRATORY.

cat.1:
Status report, Riggs is here with {1}'s intervention!
Did we ever get that hand cannon of her's back from the spacial?
cat.2:
Hey, Riggs is next-loop ready with the help of {1}.
Maybe I should prepare some boba as a little treat...

backup.1:
DETECTED: PILOT <c=riggs>RIGGS</c> ON STANDBY FROM {1}.
PREPARING TAPIOCA FOR FUTURE CONSUMPTION.

cat.1:
Peri's ready to go now, since {1} helped out.
...Though actually, she really needs the nap, so wait until the next loop?
cat.2:
Hey, Peri's on-standby now, thanks {1}!
She'll be happy to get her hands on some firing solutions.

backup.1:
DETECTED: CAPTAIN <c=peri>HYPERIA</c> ON STANDBY FROM {1}.
UPDATING WEAPON CALIBRATION PREFERENCES.

cat.1:
Oh, {1} just managed to link us back up with Isaac!
The drone bay was kind of collecting dust, overall.
cat.2: Isaac's back in action, since {1} worked some spacial magic.

backup.1:
DETECTED: ENGINEER <c=goat>ISAAC</c> ON STANDBY FROM {1}.
INITIALIZING DRONE BAY STERILIZATION.

cat.1:
Oh boy, looks like Drake is back due to {1}...
Making a reminder to invest in some more fire suppression for later.
cat.2:
I think {1} touched the thermostat, because Drake is on-board now.
We'll need to turn the A/C on full-blast once she unthaws.

backup.1:
ALERT: MARAUDER <c=eunice>DRAKE</c> ON-BOARD FROM {1}.
ERROR: AIRLOCK SYSTEM DISABLED. CANNOT ASPHYXIATE.

cat.1:
We've got Max on-board now because of {1}!
Just going to ignore the requested Max wanted to play for that occasion.
cat.2:
Sweet, looks like Max has joined us in cryosleep thanks to {1}.
...He wanted me to play a recording when he arrived but naaaaah.

backup.1:
AUDIO PLAYBACK INITIATED FROM {1} FOR <c=hacker>MAX</c>.
"Yeah, neighborhood hacker here. Going to take a quick nap, but wake me up whenever!"

cat.1:
Oh nice, Books is back thanks to {1}...
Or maybe she just warped back in all by herself...right into the cryo pod.
cat.2:
Hey, Books is here now! She wants her regards to be sent to
{1}...so uh, regards sent?

backup.1:
TEMPORAL ANAMOLY DETECTED FROM {1}.
DESIGNATION: <c=shard>BOOKS.</c> TEMPORARY PERMISSIONS GRANTED.

cat.1:
qqqWkeajhg-------d-s23123!!!!!-11111!!!!!...
...Oh cool, {1} gave me manual overrides to our ships, thanks!
cat.2:
{1}<c=keyword>@AP~REMOTE</c>: <c=healthBarShield>~</c>/CC CAT.EXE -unlock
Log: Successfully unlocked <c=comp>CAT</c> for use in run-- WHAT???

backup.1:
ERROR: <c=comp>CAT</c> MATRIX UNRECOVERABLE DESPITE {1}
INSTATING TEMPORAL FLAG FOR STANDARD CREW ACCESS; GRANTED.

cat.1:
Looks like {1} helped abate some of {2}'s amnesia.
I'm still wondering how that's even possible, but we can make progress!
cat.2:
{1} worked some magic, and {2} is able
to remember better. Let's get them to the Cobalt when we can!

backup.1: MNESTICS APPLIED TO {2}, AMNESIA DAMPENED.

cat.1:
...Huh? Did Books really need the memory booster here too? 
Doubt {1} is a doctor, but if they think its important...

backup.1: MEMORY ENHANCERS DEPLOYED FOR <c=shard>BOOKS</c>. ADAPTING TO UNKNOWN PHYSIOLOGY.

cat.1:
Books got another memory booster over from {1}.
I guess she does need those boosters after all...the temporalstream is weird.

backup.1: ADDITIONAL MEMORY ENHANCERS ADMINISTERED TO <c=shard>BOOKS</c>. ADAPTATION LEVELS 64.12%.

cat.1:
Look at that, one more memory booster for Books from {1}.
Now is that enough, so I can stop questioning why she needs them???

backup.1: FINAL MEMORY ENHANCERS ADMINISTERED TO <c=shard>BOOKS</c>. FULLY ADAPTED.

cat.1:
What the...! One of my memory banks was already encrypted, and then DECRYPTED???
{1} is responsible for that...and I feel like the Cobalt wants that.

backup.1:
REQUEST FROM: {1}
UNENCRYPTED: <c=comp>CAT</c> MEMORY DATABANK 0x434F42414C54FFFF.

cat.1:
Another memory bank unencrypted for me...why these in particular?
...Hmm, well, if {1} wants us to visit the Cobalt for that, let's do it.

backup.1:
REQUEST FROM: {1}
UNENCRYPTED: <c=comp>CAT</c> MEMORY DATABANK 0x434F524520594159.

cat.1:
...Whoa. I just felt something....ephemeral. Whatever that means in the end,
I believe {1} allowed me to visit the Cobalt to its fullest extent.

backup.1:
REQUEST FROM: {1}
ACCESSING TEMPORAL UPLINK. FINAL <c=comp>CAT</c> MEMORY??? ACCESSIBLE.

cat.1:
{1} sent us over...well, nothing, really? Just a minor boost. 
Would it be too greedy to hope for something more?
cat.2:
Our generators got boosted a bit by {1}.
Doesn't seem like we got anything else though...
cat.3:
Small surge in power from {1}, but not much else.
At least we didn't get a trap or anything, so it's still appreciated, but...

backup.1: MINOR GENERATOR SURGE APPLIED.

cat.1:
Would you look at that, {1} activated a {0} on us.
Nice!!! Maybe reconsider looking for one of their shiny anomalies!
cat.2:
Wow! {1} decided to send us a {0}!
Aren't we supposed to be working together???
cat.3:
Ugh, {1} launched a {0} through the temporalstream.
Let's hope it doesn't mess with us too badly.

backup.1: ALERT: SUBTERFUGE (Type: {0}) ACTIVATED

cat.1:
Yeeeeeah, you all know that prank we sent over to {1}?
They got their revenge with a {0}. Kinda deserved?
cat.2:
Welp! {1} got their vengeance on us with a {0}.
Who could've guessed that would've happened???
cat.3:
Woop woop woop! Alert alert, we just had a {0} impact us!
It was sent by {1}...who we messed with earlier. Coincidence???

cat.once1:
Oh hey, {1} sent us a bunch of cargo!
...Wait, it's way too much cargo...and they're all EMPTY?????
cat.1:
{1} just sent us a Genesis package. After taking what was
inside and leaving us the boxes. Wow!!! Thanks!!!
cat.2:
Detecting a spacial rift made by {1}!
Looks like we've got...got...trash. It was a bunch of containers. Great!!!

backup.1: ALERT: GENESIS DELIVERY ACCEPTED. CARGO CONTENTS: N/A
backup.2: ALERT: RECEIVED A COPY OF BIG RIGS: OVER THE ROAD RACING
backup.3: ALERT: RECEIVED ONE WITH NOTHING, BARBARIAN HUT, AND SNAKEBITE.

cat.once1:
{1} sent us a Missing Trap...like the trap is missing?
Seems like we should be perfectly fine then! ...Wait a second.
cat.1:
And one of us just got poofed because of {1}.
Well, good thing it can't be me this time around!!!
cat.2:
Ah, one of the crew just vanished! ...{1} was reponsible
for that. Maybe we should send them something 'good' as a thank you!

backup.1: ALERT: MINIATURE POCKET DIMENSION ON-BOARD.
backup.2: ALERT: CREW MEMBER MOMENTARILY ON SHORE LEAVE.

cat.1:
Wow, I didn't know {1} was a part of Sunshine Heavy Industries.
BECAUSE THEY JUST MESSED UP OUR WHOLE SHIP!!!
cat.2:
What the...hey, {1} just screwed with our entire ship!
That girl from the shipyard must be cackling right now.
cat.3:
We just got shuffled up from {1}! 
How would they like it if THEY got randomized around???

backup.1: ALERT: EMERGENCY SWAPPING PROTOCOLS ACTIVATED.

cat.1:
Huh??? Now we have {0} to contend with...
{1} is shaking things up, but I'm not sure if I like that!
cat.2:
Hey, is {1} secretly working with Books or something?
{0} was just applied to us, and I didn't expect her chaos here!

backup.1: ALERT: {0} ACTIVATED. ADJUSTING LOOP PARAMETERS.

MapSwapCharacter.tooltip:
A collection of otherworldly crystals.
It may hide some familiar faces...
MapSwapCharacter.CAT1: Are these... our friends? Stuck in other worlds?
MapSwapCharacter.CAT2: We might be able to get one out...
MapSwapCharacter.CAT3: But we don't have room for more in here. One of you will have to go into cryo-stasis again.
MapSwapCharacter.DizzyPre: I do some of my best thinking while asleep.
MapSwapCharacter.DrakePre: Heh. You won't survive without me.
MapSwapCharacter.choice2: Who are we swapping them with?
MapSwapCharacter.DrakePost: WAUGH! Don't startle me like that!
MapSwapCharacter.CATPost: Wait, this doesn't make any sense. Is this a time loop thing?
